rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 14, 2013, line 6. - DEFENDANT DORIS WONG'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Amend demurrer to Third Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to cause of action for dissolution of partnership and breach of contract to allege whether "partnership agreement" was written, oral or implied. TAC 52, 52 and 63 do not contain such allegations. Hearing Required to address why demurrer to causes of action for breach of fiduciary duties and accounting should not be sustained without leave to amend. =(D501/ REQ)
